title: Stablecoins are not just a crypto product. They're becoming the default payment rail.
message_html: Stablecoins are not just a crypto product. They're becoming the default payment rail. ...
snippet: Brila (@BrilaFinance): Stablecoins are not just a crypto product. They're becoming the default payment rail. Stripe acquired Bridge. Visa settles on-chain. PayPal issued its own dollar. The payment networks didn't wait for permission, they rebuilt their infrastructure around programmable dollars.
